fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the reservation worksheet you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the reservation worksheet name you are creating.

fields.name: Demand Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of demand that the reservation worksheet will be used for.

fields.name: Start Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the formula that is used to calculate the start date for the reservation worksheet.

fields.name: End Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the formula that is used to calculate the end date for the reservation worksheet.

fields.name: No. of Lines
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of lines in this worksheet batch.
